title: Frontend Batch 24 - Blog Notion Workspace Fallback Reinforcement
summary: Reinforced Blog Notion workspace rendering for malformed list and active document values.
behaviorBugsFound: Blog Notion workspace could render New post or blank text for malformed titles.
Blank ids could produce broken admin blog links.
Malformed dates could render Invalid Date.
Malformed tag arrays could leak nullish or blank metadata.
Blog library sheet was missing required dialog title/description semantics.

validation.command: npx skills find react notion workspace fallback testing

validation.notes: Initial failure was a typecheck-only malformed fixture typing issue.

remainingGaps: Server page selected-id miss behavior remains basic.
Save attempts with malformed ids were intentionally not changed.
Blog Notion autosave failure message sanitization remains covered only through existing generic save error behavior.
recommendation: Proceed to Frontend Batch 25 - Admin Editor Save Failure Sanitization Reinforcement.
